content: {"file": "backend/pipeline/nodes/create_ado.py", "summary": "This file contains logic to create an Epic, User Story, and associated tasks (development and unit test) in Azure DevOps (ADO). It processes a state object containing system details and approved stories, then uses the ADO MCP client to create work items hierarchically. If any step fails, it logs errors but continues processing other stories.", "rules": [{"name": "_join_tags", "description": "Joins tags with semicolons for Azure DevOps requirements.", "conditions": ["tags are provided as strings"], "actions": ["joins the tags using '; '"]}, {"name": "_story_title", "description": "Generates a title string for an Epic or User Story in ADO based on system details and PPM information.", "conditions": ["system_name, ppm_number, ppm_name are available"], "actions": ["returns formatted title string"]}, {"name": "_story_description", "description": "Constructs the description text for an Epic or User Story including user story and acceptance criteria.", "conditions": ["story dictionary is provided with keys 'user_story' and 'acceptance_criteria'"], "actions": ["joins and formats the description using HTML line breaks"]}, {"name": "_render_dict_section", "description": "Converts a dictionary or list into an HTML formatted string for ADO descriptions.", "conditions": ["value can be dict, list, or other types"], "actions": ["returns HTML formatted string based on value type"]}, {"name": "_dev_task_description", "description": "Generates the description text for development tasks including various sections like user story, acceptance criteria, technical approach, etc.", "conditions": ["task dictionary is provided with relevant keys"], "actions": ["joins and formats task details using HTML line breaks"]}, {"name": "_unit_test_description", "description": "Constructs the description text for unit test tasks including test scenarios, data, setup, assertions, etc.", "conditions": ["test dictionary is provided with relevant keys"], "actions": ["joins and formats test details using HTML line breaks"]}, {"name": "create_ado_node", "description": "Creates an ADO hierarchy of work items (Epic -> User Story -> Tasks) for each approved story in the state object.", "conditions": ["state contains system_name, ppm_number, ppm_name, and approved_stories"], "actions": ["creates Epic, User Story, development tasks, unit test tasks using ADO MCP client", "logs errors if creation fails"]}], "dependencies": ["ado_mcp.ado_client.get_ado_mcp_client", "pipeline.state.StoryForgeState"]}
